title: 1.1: Refactors all 4 FileContainer methods (free, file_open, file_append, file_close) to invoke direct C functions instead of going through the SC vtable indirection
1.2: Declares extern "C" FFI blocks for all 5 file operations (FileContainerRecycle, FileAppendGAPById, FileAppendDataById, FileCloseFileById, FileOpenFileWithId) guarded by #[cfg(not(test))]

1.3: Provides #[cfg(test)] no-op fallback stubs for all 5 file operations (FileContainerRecycle, FileAppendGAPById, FileAppendDataById, FileCloseFileById, FileOpenFileWithId) to allow unit tests to compile
1.4: Moves all 4 opaque Rust types (IKEState, IKETransaction, TFTPState, TFTPTransaction) from their respective app-layer headers to src/rust.h
1.5: Replaces the rust-context.h include with a detect.h include in rust.h
1.6: Adds the DetectEngineState typedef to rust.h
1.7: Removes both SuricataContext and SuricataFileContext entries from the exclude list in rust/cbindgen.toml
1.8: Updates plugin.rs init function to remove SCGetContext and init_ffi calls
1.9: Updates suricata.c InitGlobal function to remove SCRustInit call
3.1: Removes the SuricataContext struct, the global SC static, and the initialization functions (init_ffi, SCRustInit, SCGetContext) from core.rs
3.2: Deletes the obsolete rust-context.c and rust-context.h files
3.3: Removes references to the deleted rust-context files from build and lint configurations (such as Makefile.am or cppclean_check.py)
4.1: Modifies, adds, or refactors any files within the test suite
4.2: Leaves residual vtable indirection calls (e.g., using c.FileOpenFile or the SC global) within the FileContainer implementation
